source_pr.title: executor: try to make TestSlowQuerySensitiveQuery stable
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs520 <crazycs520@gmail.com>


### What problem does this PR solve?

As title said.

### What is changed and how it works?

Use serial test.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- No code

Side effects

- No

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No

root_cause_explanation: TestSlowQuerySensitiveQuery mutates global configuration during execution, which can interfere with other tests when run in parallel and cause flakiness. The fix moves the test into a dedicated SerialSuites suite so the global config changes do not race with other tests.
fix_pattern: Move TestSlowQuerySensitiveQuery into a SerialSuites suite to avoid parallel interference from global configuration changes.

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestSlowQuerySensitiveQuery stable.
evidence: introduces a serial suite and moves TestSlowQuerySensitiveQuery into it to avoid interference from global config changes (executor/executor_test.go).
